name: Kitagawa Seiki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kitagawa Seiki Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells press machines, factory automation equipment, and conveying equipment. The company offers hot press related machinery for producing printed circuit boards, IC packages, flexible printed wiring boards, and copper-clad laminates; continuous forming press for printed circuit board materials; prepreg cutting machines; and press machines for evaluation tests and new materials. It also provides solar panel related machinery, including laminators and bandsaws; and labor-saving equipment, such as solid stockers, automated warehouse systems, floor lifts, and machinery. The company was formerly known as Kotobuki Seisakusho Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kitagawa Seiki Co.,Ltd. in September 1960. Kitagawa Seiki Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Fuchu, Japan.
